title: [有冇搞錯] OSX High Sierra bug

replies.msg: 唔咁 set Apple 點 remote access + full control 你部 mac 機
好似得10.13 有呢個問題
其實點解prompt用家打密碼畀人可以改username

其實點解prompt用家打密碼畀人可以改username

理論上應該係平時登入普通account，有需要時再登入係sudoer嘅account

Security Update 2017-001

Released November 29, 2017

Directory Utility

Available for: macOS High Sierra 10.13.1

Not impacted: macOS Sierra 10.12.6 and earlier

Impact: An attacker may be able to bypass administrator authentication without supplying the administrator’s password

Description: A logic error existed in the validation of credentials. This was addressed with improved credential validation.

CVE-2017-13872

When you install Security Update 2017-001 on your Mac, the build number of macOS will be 17B1002. Learn how to find the macOS version and build number on your Mac.

If you require the root user account on your Mac, you will need to re-enable the root user and change the root user's password after this update.

If you experience issues with authenticating or connecting to file shares on your Mac after you install this update, you can repair file sharing.
